headline: Tapestry (TPR) Stock After 72% One-Year Jump Is The Rally Running Out Of Room
summary: If you are wondering whether Tapestry stock still offers value after a strong run, this article will help break down what the current price might be implying. Tapestry closed at US$143.50, with the stock up 3.2% over the past month, 11.2% year to date, and 72.4% over the last year, while the three and five year returns are both very large multiples of the starting point. Recent coverage around Tapestry has focused on its positioning in the luxury and consumer durables space, as investors...
